sections.prompt: Raise your right arm slowly to face level on your far right, keeping your elbow slightly extended, and turn your palm to face the ceiling.
Hold your right arm out to the side, far to your right, around chest level, keeping your elbow a little bent, and show me your palm facing upwards.
Extend your right arm to your far right, positioning it at face level and keep your elbow slightly bent, make sure the back of your hand is facing up.
Bring your right arm up to chest level, bent at the elbow, and with your palm facing downwards.
Slowly bring your right arm up to chest level on your right side, bending your elbow, and make sure your palm faces inward.
Could you please lift your right arm out to the right at waist level, keeping your elbow a bit bent and with your palm facing inwards, very slowly?
Slowly bring your right arm up to face level, extending your elbow slightly and turning your palm outward.
Bring your right arm out to the side, keeping it at chest level, with a bent elbow and the back of your hand facing inward.
Position your right arm to chest level, towards your right side, with your elbow bent and knuckles pointing right.
Position your right arm out to your right side, elbow bent, palm facing left, and keep it at face level.
Extend your right arm to your far right, at chest level, with your elbow bent, making sure your palm is facing to the right, and do it slowly.
Raise your right arm to face level, bending your elbow and positioning your hand far to the right with your palm facing right.
